hero.title: Every seller deserves aworld-class COO.
hero.desc: ClawCross is the AI-native intelligent workbench for cross-border e-commerce. Three intelligent hands reach any platform—while your AI COO partner runs the entire operation, around the clock.
hero.proof: Join 500+ sellers on the early access waitlist
hero.termTitle: ClawCross · Project: Pet Water Fountain · US

chat.termTitle: ClawCross · Project: Pet Water Fountain · US

messages.text: Good morning. Competitor "SmartPaw Pro" dropped prices 18% overnight on Amazon US. I've prepared three response scenarios.
Conservative: Hold price, boost PPC by 15% targeting their ASIN. Projected ACoS stays under 22%. Estimated weekly revenue impact: +$340.

hands.title: Reach any platform, without limits.
hands.desc: ClawCross intelligently routes every operation through the fastest, most reliable channel. You never choose—the AI does.

h1.title: CLI / MCP Direct
h1.desc: Lightning-fast structured API connections to platforms. The most precise path for automation, bulk sync, and real-time data.
h1.f1: Amazon SP-API — orders, ads, inventory, FBA
h1.f2: Shopee, TikTok Shop, Lazada Open APIs

h2.title: ClawCross in Chrome
h2.desc: AI-powered browser automation that works on any website. When a platform lacks an API, ClawCross reads the DOM and drives the browser like a human expert.
h2.f3: Supplier discovery via reverse image search
h2.f4: Bulk backend operations on any web portal

h3.title: Computer Use
h3.desc: AI-driven desktop control that operates any software. From legacy ERPs to Photoshop—if you can click it, ClawCross automates it.
h3.f3: Image editing via Photoshop or Canva

pipeline.title: From idea to optimized operation.
pipeline.desc: Every product follows a disciplined five-stage pipeline with quality gates. No guesswork—only advance when you're truly ready.

s1.d: AI evaluates demand, competition, logistics & compliance across target markets

s2.d: Automated 1688 scraping, supplier comparison, negotiation scripts & full landed cost

s3.d: Multi-language AI listings with SEO optimization, quality scoring & A/B testing ready

s4.d: Auto-publish to Amazon, Shopee, TikTok Shop, Temu and more with platform-specific pricing

s5.d: Continuous ads, pricing, inventory & customer service optimization with daily briefings

skills.title: Every skill you need, built in.
skills.desc: Each Skill is a deep knowledge module covering one domain of cross-border commerce. Your AI COO draws on all 16 simultaneously.

modes.title: Grows with your business.
modes.desc: ClawCross adapts to your experience and trust level. Start with guided assistance, evolve to full autonomy on your own timeline.

m1.title: Guided Every Step
m1.desc: AI actively leads you through each decision. Every action is explained, confirmed, and tracked. Build your first international business with confidence.

m2.title: Side by Side
m2.desc: AI works alongside you, surfacing insights and anomalies before they become problems. You make the calls, AI handles monitoring and groundwork.

m3.title: Run on Autopilot
m3.desc: AI autonomously executes hundreds of daily operations. Set your thresholds, define your rules, and only intervene for high-stakes decisions.

eco.title: A living ecosystem of intelligence.
eco.desc: ClawCross is more than a tool—it's a platform. Build, publish, and monetize custom Agents for the cross-border commerce industry.

f1.name: Agent Marketplace
f1.desc: 50+ Agents covering every e-commerce scenario. Install with one click. Publish your own and earn 70% revenue.

f2.name: Developer Platform
f2.desc: Full SDK, secure sandbox, MCP tools, and 70% revenue share. Build once, sell to thousands of sellers.

f3.name: Vertical Skill Packs
f3.desc: Category-specific packs for electronics, fashion, home goods, and beauty—with deep platform knowledge built in.

cards.d: Market research through first sale in a single guided workflow
Competitor analysis to differentiated listing in under 24 hours
Diagnose underperformers and automatically run A/B improvements
90-day Black Friday / Prime Day / 11.11 preparation workflow
Evaluate, adapt listings, and launch into new markets end-to-end
Automated daily reports, anomaly handling, and self-adjustment

conn.title: Connected to every platform you sell on.
conn.desc: 10+ native connectors out of the box. If a platform has an API, ClawCross uses it. If not, ClawCross in Chrome handles it.

cards.d: Orders, advertising, inventory, FBA, Brand Analytics
Products, orders, chat, logistics & marketing campaigns
Products, orders, creator campaigns & short video ads
Supplier search, product detail, reverse image sourcing
Full portal automation — listings, promotions, orders
Independent store products, orders, themes & analytics
